q1-2026.label: Q1 2026
q1-2026.summary: Platform foundation: lab orchestration, scenario engine, and unified learning workspace for autonomous practice.

q2-2026.label: Q2 2026
q2-2026.summary: Focus on adaptivity: personalized learning paths, automatic session review, and multi-level hint system.

q3-2026.label: Q3 2026
q3-2026.summary: Focus on scale: content factory, skills matrix, and multi-tenancy for independent learning programs.

q4-2026.label: Q4 2026
q4-2026.summary: Focus on integrations and analytics: LMS, API, telemetry export, and executive skills reporting.

q1-2027.label: Q1 2027
q1-2027.summary: Focus on integrations and analytics: LMS, API, telemetry export, and executive skills reporting.

lab-orchestrator.name: Lab Orchestration
lab-orchestrator.description: Unified layer for managing lab environments: start, stop, reset, and lifecycle control without instructor intervention.

scenario-engine.name: Scenario and Learning Steps Engine
scenario-engine.description: Step-by-step scenario system with checkpoints, execution logic, completion conditions, and action validation.

student-workspace.name: Personal Learning Workspace
student-workspace.description: Learner interface with goals, materials, hints, artifacts, and overall practice progress tracking.

sandbox-reset.name: Environment Reset to Known State
sandbox-reset.description: Quickly restore lab environment to reference configuration after errors, experiments, or incomplete scenarios.

checkpoints.name: Checkpoints and Save Points
checkpoints.description: Intermediate state saving mechanism to continue long exercises without replaying all stages.

attempt-telemetry.name: Basic Attempt and Time Telemetry
attempt-telemetry.description: Collection of execution time, attempt count, freezes, and common errors for subsequent scenario efficiency analysis.

adaptive-paths.name: Adaptive Learning Paths
adaptive-paths.description: Automatic adjustment of learning route based on user strengths, weaknesses, pace, and accumulated results.

auto-debrief.name: Automatic Session Review
auto-debrief.description: Summary of user actions after scenario completion: errors, missed steps, successful solutions, and improvement recommendations.

mentor-hints.name: Multi-level Hints
mentor-hints.description: Flexible hint system with multiple detail levels: from light guidance to nearly complete solution explanation.

skill-gap.name: Skill Gap Detection
skill-gap.description: Automatic identification of topics and competencies where the user experiences the most difficulty during practice.

difficulty-tuning.name: Dynamic Difficulty Adjustment
difficulty-tuning.description: Adaptation of task difficulty based on progress and completion quality to maintain optimal challenge level.

content-factory.name: Scenario Content Factory
content-factory.description: Environment for creating, editing, validating, and versioning learning scenarios and practical exercises.

skills-matrix.name: Skills Matrix and Coverage
skills-matrix.description: Mapping scenarios to specific skills and knowledge areas to track curriculum coverage and identify gaps.

tenant-management.name: Multi-tenancy
tenant-management.description: Support for isolated spaces for different teams, customers, or learning cohorts with their own configuration.

versioning.name: Scenario Versioning
versioning.description: Storage and release of multiple versions of the same scenario for different difficulty levels, cohorts, and curriculum editions.

review-flow.name: Content Review and Publication
review-flow.description: Process for approval, review, and safe publication of new scenarios and changes to existing practical exercises.

lms.name: LMS Integrations
lms.description: Integration with external learning management systems for transferring statuses, assignments, results, and learning analytics.

public-api.name: Public API
public-api.description: Programmatic interface for integrating PT EdTechLab with external platforms, portals, and internal company services.

telemetry-export.name: Telemetry Export
telemetry-export.description: Export of events and completion metrics to external analytics and management systems.

executive-reporting.name: Executive Reporting
executive-reporting.description: Reports and dashboards for managers showing skill mastery levels, learning dynamics, and problem areas.

sso.name: SSO and Unified Identity
sso.description: Single authentication and linked user profile for seamless operation between PT EdTechLab and corporate ecosystem.
